channel.title: Pages on Juan Rodriguez Monti Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Juan Rodriguez Monti Blog

item.title: About me!
item.author: rmontijuan@gmail.com (Juan Rodriguez Monti)
item.description: I’m Juan Rodríguez Monti. I’m from Argentina. I’m a programmer. I like, in no specific order, Algorithms, Python, Data Structures, Maths, Machine Learning, Music, Philosophy, Books, Fútbol. I’m open to new adventures ! Feel free to contact me for new jobs, conferences, or (whatever-reason) you want. You can reach me at rmontijuan ‘@’ gmail ‘.’ com !
